text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking for some training books<n>in the library
after school, when...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I happen to see Zenno Rob Roy,<n>reading as
happily as ever.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh? You mean this book?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The Ultimate Collection of WesternHeroic Tales. It's actually one ofmy all-time favorites.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes... Um, do you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's so exciting! Stories about<n>heroes are
just so wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Nobody starts out magnificent, right?<n>Plenty of
heroes were nobodies at<n>first.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But they get stronger, little by little.<n>They
overcome all sorts of trials and<n>hardships...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And in the end... they come to shine in<n>the
spotlight! At the center of<n>everyone's attention!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I read those dramatic stories, I<n>think about
how I'd like an arc like<n>that myself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I might be all shy and inconspicuous<n>now, but
someday... I could be the<n>main character, just
like a hero!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Which is why...
choice_data_list: You look up to heroes so much.
You look up to heroes so much.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I just got caught up in the moment<n>and started
blabbering on.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: So, um, what brings you to the<n>library?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that I'm looking for<n>some
reference materials.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I see... If you don't think I'll be in the<n>way...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Why not let me help you as thanks<n>for listening
to me?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I am the student librarian, so I'dlike to think I know my way aroundthe books here...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After Zenno Rob Roy helps me pick<n>out a book, I
let it absorb me for a<n>while...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Right... Before we finish, let me share<n>a chapter
from this heroic tale with<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm sure of it. This hero isreally something!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
She used a rope to tie herself to a<n>huge bull, then
trained her body by<n>having a tug-of-war with it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it really is. She's truly as tough<n>as they
come, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I'm training, I try to channel<n>that same
spirit too.
choice_data_list: You really work hard, don't you.
You really work hard, don't you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...I try.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm a nobody at the moment...<n>I'm going
to make it big someday,<n>like those heroes. I just
know it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I race, I'll show everyone that<n>I'm the
main character of my own<n>story!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As Zenno Rob Roy speaks, I see a<n>strong
determination in her eyes.
